……誰だ？<br>構わないぞ、入れ。: ...Who is it? Never mind, come in.
エルドラーナ共和国警備隊の、カーラです！<br>本日よりこの前線基地部隊でお世話:
I am Carla of the Eldorana Republic Guard!
I will be serving with this Frontline Base unit starting today!
粉骨砕身、職務を遂行いたします！<br>よろしくお願いします！:
I will dedicate myself body and soul to my duties!
I look forward to working with you!
ああ、エルドラーナ正規軍から援軍が来るんだったな。<br>話は聞いている。:
Ah, right, reinforcements were coming from the Eldorana regular
army. I've been briefed.
礼儀正しく、実直そうなやつだな。<br>任務に対する真摯な姿勢が、全身から感じら:
You seem polite and sincere. Your earnest attitude towards your
mission comes through loud and clear. You seem like a good warrior.
訓練を受けた兵士が増えるのは助かる。<br>頼りにさせてもらおう。:
Having more trained soldiers is a big help.
I'll be counting on you.
しかし……言動は真面目なのに、<br>その服装はどういうことだ？: But... despite your serious words and actions, what's with that outfit?
この服装はエルドラーナ共和国警備隊の、<br>正規の女性用制服です！:
This uniform is the official women's attire of the Eldorana Republic
Guard!
……そ、そうか。<br>ちなみに聞くが、どういう理由で水着なんだ？:
...I-Is that so?
By the way, mind if I ask why it's a swimsuit?
はい、我々エルドラーナ共和国警備隊は、<br>主に海賊対策の任務をおこなっており:
Yes! The Eldorana Republic Guard primarily handles anti-piracy
missions!
海上や海辺が主要な活動場所ですので、<br>それに適した制服が採用されています！:
Our main theater of operations is on the sea and along the coasts,
so we've adopted a uniform suited to that environment.
なるほど、意味はあるのか。<br>それにしても珍しくはあるな。:
I see, so it does serve a purpose.
Still, it's pretty unusual.
お目汚しかもしれませんが、<br>誇りある制服ですので、どうぞご容赦をお願いしま:
I apologize if it is unsightly, but it is a uniform we take pride in, so I
ask for your understanding.
いや……お目汚しどころか眼福だが……。<br>あー……カーラはいいのか、恥ずかし:
No... far from being hard on the eyes, it's a feast for the eyes...
Uh... Carla, are you okay with it? Aren't you embarrassed?
……私は軍人ですので、<br>制服に対して個人的な感想は発言できません。:
...As a soldier, I'm not at liberty to offer personal opinions on the
uniform.
しかし、誇りある制服、か。<br>なるほどなるほど、それはいいことを聞いた。:
But a uniform you take pride in, eh?
I see, I see, that's good to know.
はい……？<br>それは、どういう……？: Yes...? What do you mean by that...?
カーラが着ているのは正規の制服なわけだ。<br>つまり、しっかり確認しても問題は:
So Carla's wearing the official uniform.
That means there's no problem with a thorough inspection, right?
いやなに、初めて見る制服だからなぁ。<br>この機会にじっくりと見てみたい。:
Well, it's my first time seeing this uniform.
I want to look at it carefully while I have the chance.
ああ、じっくりと、ねっとりと、だ。<br>……制服なのだから、構わないな？:
Yeah, slowly and deliberately.
...It's a uniform, so there's no problem, right?
もも、もちろんです！ エルドラーナ共和国警備隊員として、<br>制服は常に正しく:
O-of course! As a member of the Eldorana Republic Guard,
I always wear my uniform properly!
問題があるのか？？ <br>制服を近くで見て何が悪い？？？:
Is there a problem?
What's wrong with looking at the uniform up close?
悪い、などとは……。<br>ただ退屈ではありませんか、と。:
It's not that it's wrong...
I just thought it might be boring for you.
いいや、実に充実した時間だ。<br>しかしこれは……大きいな……:
No, I'm having a very fulfilling time.
But this... is big...
その帽子の飾りだよ。<br>大きいじゃないか、何か由来でもあるのか？:
It's the ornament on your hat.
It's big, isn't it? Does it have some significance?
あ……は、はい。この飾りは、<br>豊かな恩恵をもたらすエルドラーナの海を象徴し:
Ah... y-yes. This ornament
symbolizes the sea of Eldorana that brings abundant blessings...
ふんふん、そうなのか。<br>しかし、こいつは……なんとも立派だな。:
Hmm, I see.
But this one... is quite impressive.
その盾だよ。<br>立派なものじゃないか。:
It's your shield.
It's a fine piece, isn't it?
こ、これは海での戦いを主眼に、<br>軽さと取り回しを重視した装備で……:
Th-this equipment is designed for naval combat, with an emphasis on
lightness and maneuverability...
……そんなに大きいとは思わないのですが、<br>本当に盾のことでしょうか……？:
...I don't think it's that big... are you really talking about the
shield...?
もちろん盾の話だ。<br>そしてなによりも……こりゃデカいな。: Of course I'm talking about the shield. And above all... this is huge.
おっと、そうだな。<br>ついからかいたくなった、勘弁してくれ。: Oh, you're right. Sorry, I couldn't help teasing.
こ、今回は忘れますので、<br>今後はご容赦ください……: Th-this time I'll let it slide, but please be more careful in the future.
そうか。<br>ああ、気をつけよう。: I see. Yeah, I'll be careful.
それで、カーラの異動の連絡は受けているが、<br>どうしてエルドラーナの軍人がこ:
So, I've been notified about your transfer, but why did an Eldorana
military officer come to this base?
エ、エルドラーナの海賊が、<br>前線基地にいるとかいないとかの情報がありまして:
There are reports that E-Eldorana pirates might be at the Frontline
Base...
その捕縛的なことを主な任務として、<br>こちらに派遣された次第で、その……: I was dispatched here primarily to apprehend them, and, well...
（事前にエルドラーナから、<br>カーラという女性警備隊員の派遣連絡はあった）:
I received advance notice from Eldorana about the dispatch of a
female guard named Carla.
（しかし海賊が理由、とは聞いていない。<br>通常の援軍派遣という名目だったはず:
But I hadn't heard that pirates were the reason. It was supposed to
be a routine reinforcement dispatch.
……ちなみに、<br>期間はどの程度だと聞いている？: By the way, how long were you told your assignment would be?
そ、その、この前線基地では、<br>常に戦力が不足していると聞いていますが……:
W-well, I've heard that this Frontline Base is always short on
personnel, but...
援軍はいつでも歓迎だが、<br>カーラは少し毛色が違うからな。: Reinforcements are always welcome, but you're a bit different, Carla.
任務で来たというなら、<br>さっさと目的を果たして帰るのか？: If you came for a mission, are you going to complete it and go back?
いえ、しばらくはこちらで務めを果たすようにと、<br>命じられております。:
No, I have been ordered to carry out my duties here for the time
being.
……そうか、期待している。: I see... I'm counting on you.
（期間未定の派遣、<br>取ってつけたような任務）: (An indefinite dispatch, a mission that seems tacked on.)
（そしてこの真面目な女が、<br>俺の露骨なセクハラを許すしかない、か）:
(And this serious woman has no choice but to tolerate my blatant
sexual harassment, huh.)
決まっているだろう、<br>カーラの歓迎会だ。: Isn't it obvious? Your welcome party, Carla.
エルドラーナは船乗りの国だ。<br>新人とは酒を酌み交わすのが、歓迎の証なんだろ:
Eldorana is a nation of sailors. Welcoming a new member with a drink
is a sign of hospitality, right?
そちらの流儀に従って迎えたい。<br>酒場で乾杯といこうじゃないか。:
I want to welcome you according to your customs. Let's go to the
tavern and toast.
司令官……！<br>我が国のこと、ご存知なんですね！: Commander! You know about my country!
当然だ。<br>どうだ、付き合ってくれるか？: Of course. How about it? Will you come with me?
はい！ <br>ぜひ司令官とご一緒させてください！: Yes! I'd be delighted to join you, Commander!
